/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/AStar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/AudioGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/FruitBonus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/Ghost.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/InfluenceMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/Map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/Particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/ScorePopup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/SpriteSheet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PiratePacman.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o PiratePacman   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer
